flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cape Fear Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cape Fear Community College rose 85% between 2006 and 2009 (9.3% → 17.3%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cape Fear Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (57.4% → 67.5%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cape Fear Community College are 13% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($38.7k vs $34.1k).
